attributes_note: length_m and surface_type are derived from OpenStreetMap geometry/tags via the Overpass API (pulled 2026-06-17), not a ground survey. Remaining null fields require a manual street walk to populate.

trivia.text: Named after Ana Ventura, a young resistance fighter from a Sephardic Jewish family, killed in 1944 at the age of 18. Her surname derives from a Spanish word meaning fortune or fate.
trivia.note: DRAFT — unverified. Requires sourcing before being presented as fact. Pre-1944 street name is unknown; treat as TODO until archival research is done.
